title: Origins: Elemental Alignment
description: Adds elemental versions of the base 9 origins
body:
# Requires Origins to work

 
Click the image below to be taken to [Bisect's website](https://bisecthosting.com/lankaster)
[![Bisect hosting partner link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14a1821352b2a2df5cd0aa4db55a4f7826ec1a72_0.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/lankaster)

 

Adds a new layer to choose your elemental alignment: Fire, Earth, Wind and Water

If used in combination with one of the base 9 origins it will completely transform that origin into an elemental version of itself.

 

Example: water+avian=duckling

 

If not used with one of the base origins it will give a basic set of powers themed around the chosen element

 

Includes:

1 new origin layer(elements)

36 element based origins

and way too many new powers

 

List of origins and their abilities(since it wont fit on the page): https://docs.google.com/document/d/1N0yQq0Tylmwgzygc247zH8oNCt92AeDuBkM87341cQ4/edit?usp=sharing
